steps.title: Use definition tense
steps.content: The clause defines what the Purkinje effect is. Scientific definitions and continuing facts normally use the simple present tense.

steps.title: Select simple present
steps.content: Is correctly states the Purkinje effect as the eye's tendency to perceive objects as blue tinted in low light. A, B, and C use tenses that wrongly place the definition in completed, future, or past time. The answer is D.
